Product Manager.poor: Struggles with A/B tests; relies on anecdotes or gut feel.
Product Manager.good: Consistently uses data for decisions; identifies bottlenecks in funnels.
Product Manager.strong: Predicts long-term Lifetime Value impact; connects disparate data for non-obvious insights.

Product Manager.poor: Jumps to features; treats symptoms rather than root causes.
Product Manager.good: Clearly defines the 'Job to be Done' and competitive landscape.
Product Manager.strong: Dissects deep psychological friction; reframes problems for simpler solutions.

Software Engineer.poor: Proposes fragile monoliths; ignores single points of failure.
Software Engineer.good: Designs decoupled, resilient systems with appropriate caching.
Software Engineer.strong: Architects for 10x current load; implements sophisticated circuit-breakers.

Software Engineer.poor: Unaware of race conditions or deadlocks.
Software Engineer.good: Effectively uses Kafka/Redis for asynchronous patterns.
Software Engineer.strong: Expertly manages distributed locks and low-level memory implications.

Data Analytics.poor: Inefficient JOINs; query errors; struggles with large datasets.
Data Analytics.good: Writes complex window functions and Common Table Expressions.
Data Analytics.strong: Builds automated, scalable data pipelines and self-serve tools.

Data Analytics.poor: Ignores bias/noise; draws conclusions from insufficient data.
Data Analytics.good: Correctly interprets significance and confidence intervals.
Data Analytics.strong: Identifies Simpson’s Paradox in delivery data; designs sophisticated experiments.

AI Product Manager.poor: Treats AI as a 'magic box'; doesn't understand limitations.
AI Product Manager.good: Can debate Precision vs. Recall trade-offs for a specific User Experience.
AI Product Manager.strong: Deeply understands embedding spaces and fine-tuning vs. RAG trade-offs.

AI Product Manager.poor: Forces AI where simple if/else logic works.
AI Product Manager.good: Defines a clear ROI for AI features; builds data moats.
AI Product Manager.strong: Maps out a multi-year AI roadmap that creates competitive advantages.
